reviews.comment:
Tiene mesas en un gran parque arbolado donde se puede descansar, pasear a las mascotas, comer y beber. Al lado del estacionamiento  y de la confitería con mesas interiores que otorgan descuento a los afiliados de ACA.

(Translated by Google)
It has tables in a large, wooded park where you can relax, walk your pets, eat, and drink. Next to it is the parking lot and a café with indoor tables that offer discounts to ACA members.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCanR1cnBnRRAB
